verdict.note: Verified by inspection + clean vite build: close button no longer hardcodes setSel('new'); a useEffect mirrors active's validity test (sel!=='graph' && !order.includes(sel) -> 'new'), so a closed/vanished session only bumps you to New Session if sel still points at it, else your manual switch stands. Live destructive browser close NOT run: the only sessions on :8787 are real in-flight work (closing removes their worktrees). Full browser YATU deferred pending disposable sessions.

Clean vite build passes. Live destructive browser run still deferred: the only sessions on :8787 are real in-flight work whose worktrees a close would remove.

Real screenshot: console open on a selected live session. Provably orthogonal to my edit: this branch's only SessionInterface.jsx change is the searchOpen guard (early-return when the search palette modal is open) plus its prop+stateRef plumbing — the fitTextarea auto-grow/scrollbar logic is untouched, and the guard is a no-op when no palette is open (this scenario's resting condition). Playwright over the live dashboard session interface (real working-session tabs). Toggle sequence, 6 assertions: nav starts OFF; single ⌘I → ON; ⌘I → OFF; single ⌥I → ON; ⌥I → OFF; ⌥⌘I (both modifiers) → stays OFF (no toggle). Screenshot shows single-⌘I nav mode engaged (yellow 'nav' badge, bottom bar '⌥/⌘+I, Esc-Esc, or click to exit'). The XOR fix (altKey!==metaKey) makes ⌥⌘I fall through un-prevent-defaulted so the browser devtools accelerator opens instead of the app swallowing it. Not driven: the /rawkey 'forwards nothing' arm (toggle branch returns before any sendRawKey by code) and literal devtools opening (headless).

Two-tab right pane: default Terminal (live pane + docked input); Proof tab hides the terminal (display:none, stays mounted) and renders the proof inline in .proof-pane. Tab bar distinct from terminal in light (#f4eeda vs #0d1117) and dark (#161b22 vs #0d1117). Verified via headless Chromium.

Review action row = [nav yellow, merge green], NO proof button (proof is a tab). '/' menu leads with board cmds in identity hues: /nav 181,137,0 · /proof 42,161,152 · /merge 133,153,0 · /exit 147,161,161 · /close 220,50,47, above CC's blue built-ins. /proof+Enter switches to the Proof tab (activeTab=proof).

real LIVE session inbox: typing [[term opens the shared menu ABOVE (.mention-menu.up), filtered to term-input; Enter inserts 'look at [[term-input]] ' into the draft (not sent, menu closes). send-time resolution follows the same migrated expandMentions
@282eb31 cat -v pane via POST /rawkey: C-r→^R, M-b→ESC b, S-Tab→^[[Z, M-B→ESC B, S-Up→^[[1;2A, malformed 404, C-c interrupts; token contract untouched by the ⌥-family carve-out

Re-measured after the grown-input fix (real browser, live :8787 backend, session ded8279c). Terminal default tab + ❯ input present; Eval renders inline; round-trip keeps pane intact. Real browser (Playwright/Chromium) on the worktree dashboard, backend serving two differing-harness launchers (reclaude=claude, gpt5=codex). Options read name-only (['gpt5','reclaude'], no ' · claude'/' · codex' suffix). Glyph swaps with the selection. Image shows the codex state.

Idle reclaude fixture on the isolated-clone rig @12d3ce4, real browser. Tabs = terminal|eval (prose updated this commit-pair to track review-proof's Proof→Eval fold, 11e217d). Default tab Terminal, term visible + docked ❯; tabbar vs term bg distinct in light (244,238,218 vs 13,17,23) AND dark (22,27,34 vs 13,17,23); Eval tab click → .si-term-body display:none but IN DOM (xterm layers intact), ❯ dock hidden; back to Terminal → live pane intact; grown 5-line unsent draft survives the round-trip at identical height (102px→102px, 5 lines).

Same rig/fixture (reclaude TUI's own bottom status bar as the pane's last row). At rest .si-term-body.bottom == .si-bottom.top == 946 (abut, zero overlap — status line fully visible). Grown 5 lines: term rect IDENTICAL (y=32 h=914 unchanged) — the taller input overlays, never pushes the terminal.

New-Session .si-input growth ladder measured after each settle: 24→43→82→141px all overflow-y:hidden, scrollable:false (no bar, no flicker below cap); at the 180px cap overflow-y flips to auto + scrollable:true and the last line is reachable. Exactly the cap contract.

Clone rig @12d3ce4, stub-claude launcher. Submitting a New launch NEVER moves the view/focus: after Enter the .si-input stays document.activeElement AND not disabled MID-FLIGHT (active=true disabled=false, box cleared), still on .si-new-center after a full 4s+ board poll; a second prompt types+fires with no click, still on New. New sessions only appear as rows below (surfaced by the poll). Both launches back-to-back without leaving New.

⌥↑/↓ steps the selected tab from EVERY focus state: mid-caret in the New draft (NEW→fixture→stub A→back), and mid-text in a live ❯ inbox (→stub B) with the caret text intact. ⌥N snaps to New from any tab. Plain ↑ at first line and plain ↓ at last line inside the box BOTH stay put (caret keys only, selection unmoved). Modifier never reached the textarea caret nor the pane.

/rawkey intercepted+counted. ⌥I toggles nav ON (fwd=0), ⌘I toggles it OFF (fwd=0) — both reserved, forward NOTHING (matched by e.code, ⌥I dead-key glyph notwithstanding). An ordinary 'x' WITH nav ON DOES forward (count 0→1), so the carve-out is exactly the two chords, not a blanket block. ⌥⌘I held together leaves nav unchanged and is NOT preventDefaulted (browser devtools chord untouched).

Header action row carries NO close control (only state-driven buttons). Close is row right-click → 'close' (.sess-menu-item.danger) → confirm modal (.sess-confirm .sess-rename-btn.danger). PASS1: closing the VIEWED tab (stub G) → row gone (polled) AND landed on New Session (onNew=true). PASS2: close stub H then immediately switch to the fixture → the switch STANDS (onFixture=true, H gone). Removal, not the closing gesture, decides the landing.

Clone rig, SessionWindow glance in glyph-compact mode. Not all four buckets were live this run (no working/error staged — owner guidance: verify the map is applied, don't over-stage every state); the two live buckets map correctly and glyph/word share the SAME STATUS_COLOR source (SessionWindow.jsx:78-79). Prose updated same commit-pair to the glyph carrier.

Clone rig configured with 4 named launchers → New composer shows .si-launcher-select. Real MouseEvent mousedown at the select centre: defaultPrevented=FALSE after the bubbling panel keepFocus handler (no focus sink cancels it), so the native dropdown opens on a real click; value follows a chosen option (valueChanged=true). keepFocus spares native form controls.

Options carry the launcher NAME alone (re-idle/real-glm/stub-claude/stub-codex) — no ' · claude/codex' text suffix. Beside the select a single inline-SVG .si-launcher-harness glyph: claude launcher → title 'Claude Code' (Anthropic mark), switch to stub-codex → title 'Codex' (OpenAI mark), path d and title BOTH swap (swapped=true). Icon tracks the selected launcher's harness, same vendor glyphs the radios use.

Live idle-fixture ❯ inbox (enabled). Typing 'look at [[term' opens the spec-node menu ABOVE the box (.mention-menu.up, up=true), ranked focused-first then prefix (term-input, terminal-io…). Enter accepts top row → draft becomes 'look at [[term-input]] ' (token inserted, not sent, terminal untouched). Send-time resolution target verified read-only: [[term-input]] exists in the live spec index at .spec/…/terminal-io/term-input/spec.md (the (<path>) pointer append), unknown ids pass through. Inbox draft cleared after, fixture undisturbed.

Live idle reclaude session, real browser. Before: live terminal, ❯ enabled, row present. Typed exactly /exit (dismissed the / menu with Esc so Enter dispatches), Enter → session STOPPED not removed: relaunch panel shows (offline), ❯ disabled, row STAYS, view did NOT jump to New, and the literal /exit was NOT dispatched into the pane (no /exit line). Clicked relaunch → back online on the same worktree/conversation (resumed=true).

Live idle reclaude session. Typed exactly /close (menu dismissed), Enter → session REMOVED outright: backend /api/sessions no longer lists it (authoritative poll), the row drops off, and the view lands on New Session — NO confirm prompt (typing the exact command IS the confirmation, unlike the row-menu Close which confirms). The literal /close was NOT dispatched into the pane (no /close line). rowGone+onNew+backendRemoved all true; earlier rowGone=false was a too-early frontend poll read, corrected with a backend-confirmed wait.

The REAL product path (POST /api/sessions/:id/rawkey → rawKey → tmux send-keys) exercised end to end against a live tmux pane running cat -v. Each navKeyToken arrives as the correct terminal bytes: C-r→^R(0x12), M-b→^[b(ESC b), S-Tab→^[[Z(back-tab, what CC's mode-cycle reads), M-B→^[B(ESC B), S-Up→^[[1;2A, C-c→0x03 interrupting cat -v (exit 130). Malformed C-C-x → HTTP 404, never sent as junk. tmux accepts every well-formed token. Evidence: the cat -v pane capture + the token/HTTP/bytes table.

Review+online fixture on the clone rig (claude-stub with a real rvSock so liveness reads online + done --propose merge → stable review; a live agent's mark-active hook reverts review→active on any activity, so a non-agent stub is the only way to HOLD review+online-terminal — itself a finding). (1) Action row = TWO text-only buttons, NO glyph: nav 'sc-yellow' computed rgb(181,137,0)=var --yellow, merge 'sc-green' rgb(133,153,0)=var --green; NO proof button (Proof is the Eval tab). (2) / menu: board commands lead, each name+[board] in its identity hue — /nav yellow, /proof cyan rgb(42,161,152), /merge green — CC's blue elsewhere; /exit appears ONCE (board row, no CC twin), descriptions capitalised sentences ('Exit — stop…'). (3) /proof Enter → Eval tab active, terminal display:none, no /proof line dispatched. (4) /nav Enter → nav button .on + indicator, no /nav line dispatched. Left tabs terminal|eval.

15 sessions (>viewport) on the clone rig, glance measured on #/graph. The SessionWindow is a BOUNDED glance: height 428px = 79% of the 540px viewport (cap min(80vh, 100vh-112)), and its bottom (476) stays ABOVE the .board-stats strip top (497) — clearsStats=true, the strip's chips stay visible/clickable. Overflow is NOT lost: scrollHeight 506 > clientHeight 426 → a vertical scrollbar; scrolling to the end (scrollTop→80=maxScroll, reachedEnd) brings the last row ('stub row F') fully into view. Short viewport used to exercise the vh-relative cap with 15 rows rather than piling 25+ stubs (load discipline); the cap/clear/scroll contract is identical at any viewport.

post proof->eval rename re-measure (f9a6e28), real browser on the worktree build: tab bar reads terminal|eval (no 'proof'/'证明' anywhere in console chrome), '/' inbox menu leads with /nav /eval /exit /close each [board]-tagged and identity-coloured (menu screenshot), /eval + Enter switches to the Eval tab (aria-selected, pane mounts) same as the tab click. Review-state-only rows (merge button) and the nav toggle were not re-driven — untouched by the rename (registry name + labels only). /proof is gone from the menu.

post proof->eval rename (f9a6e28), real browser, worktree build: default tab Terminal with docked ❯ input; tab bar chrome rgb(244,238,218) vs terminal rgb(13,17,23) — visibly apart; Eval tab hides (.si-term-body display:none) but does NOT unmount the terminal, input dock gone, eval renders inline (non-fixed); back to Terminal intact. Grown-input round-trip: 4-line draft, height 82px -> tab away -> back -> 82px, draft byte-identical. Driven in the app's current light chrome; the dark-theme repeat of the bg contrast was not re-driven (theme toggle lives in settings).

post-rebase re-measure, real browser on the worktree build: tab bar reads terminal|eval (aria-selected flips correctly); default tab Terminal with the docked ❯ input and live tmux; switching to Eval hides .si-term-body (display:none) WITHOUT unmounting the terminal, eval renders inline; back to Terminal the terminal is intact. post-rebase re-measure, real browser: '/' in the docked input opens the command menu led by /nav /eval /exit /close, each [board]-tagged; /eval's description names the eval tab; typing /eval + Enter switches the console to the Eval tab (aria-selected=true, pane mounts) same as a tab click; /proof appears nowhere in the menu or page.

Eval tab auto-collapses .si-list (w:240 flex → w:0 display:none), .si-list-unfold strip (22px) takes its place, .si-resizer removed. Clicking strip restores the full list while on Eval (manual unfold sticks); returning to Terminal restores it. Measured via CDP in real browser against live session 97d06c52.

Eval→Terminal round-trip fires 2 spurious resize frames (cols 221 wide-transient → 184 snap-narrow) because the list unfold lags one render behind the tab flip. On a normal-screen (codex-like) pane each resize SIGWINCHes a re-render — the pane's 'resized' counter jumps 1→3 and history 081-120 is re-emitted, so the terminal scrolls back through history to the bottom. Measured via a real browser against the live dashboard+bridge; screenshot shows the doubled 'codex-ish frame' + re-emitted history on return.

Fix: gate the list-fold DISPLAY on rightTab==='eval' (showFolded), so the list unfolds synchronously with the Terminal tab instead of via a lagging effect. Eval→Terminal round-trip now emits ZERO resize frames (was 2: 221 wide → 184 narrow); the normal-screen pane's 'resized' counter stays at its connect value (no round-trip SIGWINCH), and the pane is pixel-stable before vs after the round-trip — no scroll-through-history. Measured via the same real browser + live dashboard/bridge path.

Real browser, post-fix (showFolded gate). Terminal tab: .si-list 240px (display:flex) + .si-resizer present, no unfold strip. Eval tab: .si-list display:none (width 0, still in DOM), .si-list-unfold strip 22px in its place, .si-resizer gone. Clicking the strip restores the full 240px list while STILL on Eval (manual unfold sticks). Back to Terminal restores the full list automatically; re-entering Eval re-folds. The showFolded=(listFolded && rightTab==='eval') gate preserves every fold behavior.

Real browser, post-fix re-measure of the pane hide/unmount/restore CORE (the part the fold-display change is adjacent to): default tab Terminal with the live pane (termDisplay:block) + docked ❯ input present. Eval tab hides .si-term-body (display:none) WITHOUT unmounting it (node stays in the DOM) and drops the ❯ input; back to Terminal the pane is block again with the input restored. NOT re-driven this pass (governed by unchanged term-input/theme code): the grown-input height round-trip and the light/dark tab-bar bg-contrast sub-checks.

Refresh at merged head (32b5ed3e): Eval→Terminal round-trip emits ZERO resize frames (only the initial connect fit), pane stable — confirms the showFolded fix holds after the commit that filed the original A→B pair.

Re-measure at 72186b22, real browser, 6 live rows. Re-measure at 72186b22 through the REAL product path: POST /api/sessions/:id/rawkey (the exact body sendRawKey posts) against a live tmux pane running cat -v. Every navKeyToken arrives as the correct terminal bytes, read off the pane: C-r→^R (0x12), M-b→^[b (ESC b), S-Tab→^[[Z (back-tab, CC's mode-cycle), M-B→^[B, S-Up→^[[1;2A, C-c→^C interrupting cat (echo rc=$? → 130). Malformed C-C-x → HTTP 404 {ok:false}, never sent as junk. Browser-side raw forward re-confirmed same run in the nav-mode-reserved measurement (nav-mode 'x' → one /rawkey attempt). Screenshot = the dashboard terminal rendering the cat -v pane with the echoed byte sequences.

Repro on real browser (worktree dashboard :5301 against live :8787 board). Double-clicking a session tab WITH pending ops works: lands on #/graph with the lock banner up. Double-clicking an ops-LESS tab (the common resting state — fresh worker or committed edits) is a SILENT NO-OP: hash stays #/sessions/<id>, graph never shows, no lock. Cause: SessionInterface.jsx gates the dblclick on s.ops?.length — a birth-era gate (8ab5d929, 'no overlay = no-op') that was never updated when the lock contract became 'a no-overlay session still locks' (2e45973f; board-side single-click honors it, the tab dblclick does not). Not a deleted navigate — the with-ops path still works.

B on committed HEAD e7fda400 (same scenario as A): ops-LESS tab dblclick now navigates to #/graph with the lock banner up ('this session has no pending spec changes' — the empty-grip explanation) and the graph visible; with-ops tab dblclick still lands on #/graph locked + focused; single click still only switches tabs. Tooltip now present on ops-less rows too (session.lockTitle). Verified in real Chromium against the live :8787 board; video shows both dblclicks + the single-click control.
IME-committing Enter (isComposing) cleared the New Session box and fired POST /api/sessions — the half-composed pinyin word was SENT instead of composed.
